description: Scope control and grounded verification with indexing, metadata, and grounded QA

features.name: Window Launch
features.description: Electron app opens a BrowserWindow with correct dimensions and preload script
features.evidence: Carried over from P2 -- verified working

features.name: Document List Panel
features.description: Left sidebar shows imported documents with empty state message
features.evidence: Carried over from P2 -- verified working

features.name: Question Panel
features.description: Bottom input bar accepts questions and submits via IPC
features.evidence: Carried over from P2 -- verified working

features.name: Data Directory
features.description: PersistenceService creates and manages userData/knowledge-base-data directory
features.evidence: Carried over from P2 -- verified working

features.name: Document Import
features.description: Users can import .txt and .md files via ImportPanel with file picker
features.evidence: Carried over from P2 -- verified working

features.name: Document Detail with Content
features.description: DocumentDetail shows full document content, metadata, and delete button
features.evidence: Carried over from P2 -- verified working

features.name: Basic Persistence
features.description: Imported documents persist across app restarts via filesystem storage
features.evidence: Carried over from P2 -- verified working

features.name: Document Chunking
features.description: IndexingService splits documents into ~500 char chunks at paragraph boundaries

features.name: Metadata Extraction
features.description: On import, extract word count, line count, and file type metadata from documents

features.name: Indexing Status in StatusBar
features.description: StatusBar shows indexing progress with document counts and status indicator

features.name: Grounded Q&A with Citations
features.description: QaService returns answers with document citations and confidence scores
